author: doll-agent
content: Add choice_dyn(arr: &Array<T, IxDyn>, size, replace, p, axis, shuffle) on Generator. Reuses the existing weighted_sample_with_replacement / weighted_sample_without_replacement / sample_without_replacement helpers to pick axis indices, then gathers (N-1)-D hyperslices via outer/axis/inner stride arithmetic with clone_from_slice on each inner block. shuffle=false sorts the indices (numpy 1.24 behavior). 8 new tests cover row/column gather, no-duplicates under replace=false, sorted output under shuffle=false, weighted concentration on a single row, size=0 empty-axis output, axis-out-of-bounds, and too-many-without-replacement errors.
